title: Flash Gordon's Trip to Mars
director: Ford Beebe, Robert F. Hill, Frederick Stephani
writer: Ray Trampe, Norman S. Hall, Wyndham Gittens
actors: Buster Crabbe, Jean Rogers, Charles Middleton
plot: When a deadly Nitron ray strikes Earth, Flash Gordon and his friends travel to Mars to battle Ming the Merciless and his new ally Queen Azura.
